title: Fill in the Blank | IoT & Theory of Computation
heading: IoT & ToC: Fill in the Blank Challenge
description: Complete each sentence by typing the correct word or phrase. Answers are case-insensitive and spaces are ignored.

questions.question: The ________ layer in IoT is responsible for sensing data from the environment.
questions.hint: Also called the device layer or physical layer

questions.question: MQTT is a lightweight ________ protocol commonly used in IoT for machine-to-machine communication.
questions.hint: Publish-subscribe model, often compared to HTTP

questions.question: In the DIKW pyramid, the 'K' stands for ________.
questions.hint: Comes after Information and before Wisdom

questions.question: A ________ automaton is more powerful than a finite automaton because it uses a stack for memory.
The Pumping Lemma is used to prove that a language is ________ regular.
questions.hint: It disproves regularity, it does not prove it

questions.question: A DFA cannot have ________-transitions, whereas an NFA can.
questions.hint: Greek letter ε, also called null transitions

questions.question: XaaS converts capital expenditure (CapEx) into ________ expenditure (OpEx).
questions.hint: Opposite of capital, refers to ongoing costs

questions.question: ________ analytics answers the question 'What will happen?' by forecasting future events.
questions.hint: Uses historical data and machine learning

questions.question: IoT ________ perform protocol translation, data aggregation, and local processing between devices and cloud systems.
questions.hint: Acts as a bridge between edge devices and the cloud

questions.question: The ________ barrier refers to the limited power availability in battery-operated IoT devices.
A context-free grammar is ________ if a string has more than one leftmost derivation.
The ________ layer in IoT architecture handles data filtering, storage, and analytics.
questions.hint: Also called middleware or platform layer

questions.question: Regular languages are closed under union, concatenation, and ________ star.
A ________ is a virtual representation of a physical IoT device or system.
The ________ lemma for regular languages cannot prove that a language is regular; it only proves non-regularity.
In IoT, ________ computing processes data closer to devices rather than in a centralized cloud.
A ________ symbol in a context-free grammar appears in the final strings and cannot be replaced.
LoRaWAN is designed for long-________, low-power IoT applications.
Security by ________ means security is integrated from the initial design phase, not added later.
The ________ of a DFA reduces the number of states without changing the accepted language.
